link.failed: Connection failed, account expired or revoked
link.deleteTips: If this connection is deleted, sync tasks, uploading and downloading tasks under this connection will be stopped and deleted.
link.uploadBaiduTitle: According to Baidu Netdisk policy, the size of a single file uploaded to Cloud Drive is limited:
link.uploadBaiduTips: 4 GB for general users; 300 GB for SVIP users; 2 TB for NAS members. If uploading fails, the size of a single file may exceed the limit.
link.uploadTianYiTitle: According to 189 Cloud's guidelines, a quota has been set for uploading files each day:
link.uploadTianYiTips: For normal users, the quota is 2 GB. If upload failed, it may be because the file size exceeded the quota.
link.diskSavePath: Save path on the Cloud Drive
link.pollingTips: Applicable to real-time sync tasks. The system will check at specified intervals whether there are any changes in the cloud to sync missed files due to network interruptions. Note: Enabling "Polling interval" may prevent the hard drive from entering sleep mode
link.addedUploadTaskTips: You can check the upload progress in "upload list"
link.addedDownloadTaskTips: You can check the download progress in "download list"
link.offline: Your Cloud Drive account has expired or been revoked. Please re-verify
link.connectionDeleted: The cloud drive connection has been deleted

task.nasVipTips: To create a Baidu Netdisk sync task, you need to become a NAS member; or you can use the single upload and download function
task.buyNasVipTips: It may take some time to update membership status. Please wait patiently
task.deleteTaskTips: Do you want to delete this sync task?

logging.clearSubTitle: Clear {0} logs. The cleared logs cannot be retrieved
logging.clearAllSubTitle: Clear All logs. The cleared logs cannot be retrieved
logging.systemCleanLogsFollowingTimeRange: The system will clear logs in the following time range

selectDiskFileModal.title: Select file from {0}
selectDiskFileModal.errorTips: Failed to get the third-party cloud drive file list, please retry later.

personalModal.title: Baidu Netdisk account
personalModal.paySuccessTips200: Payment successful, benefits not yet issued
personalModal.tianYiTips: Please log in to the "189 Cloud" app to check your order records

invoiceTabModal.title: Invoice
invoiceTabModal.tips1: After the VAT invoice is issued, it will be sent directly to your receiving address
invoiceTabModal.tips2: If the invoice amount is less than RMB 100, the freight at destination shall be borne
invoiceTabModal.name: Name
invoiceTabModal.createInvoiceTips: Please leave your invoicing information. UGREEN NAS team will relay your request for invoicing to Baidu Netdisk
invoiceTabModal.createInvoiceSuccessTips: The invoice will be sent in 3-5 working days. Please wait patiently
invoiceTabModal.phoneLength: Cell phone number must be 11 digits
invoiceTabModal.phoneNumber: Cell phone number must be numbers

selectDiskModal.openVipTips1: Cloud Drive NAS membership allows to customize storage path.

deleteConnectModal.deleteTips: Once deleted, sync tasks, uploading and downloading tasks under this connection will be stopped and deleted.
deleteConnectModal.pleaseUsedPassword: Please enter the password of account {name} to continue

connect.deleteOneUploadTips: Do you want to cancel and delete this task?
connect.deleteAllUploadTips: Do you want to cancel and delete all upload tasks?
connect.deleteOneDownloadTips: Do you want to cancel and delete this task?
connect.deleteAllDownloadAll: Do you want to cancel and delete all downloads?
connect.vipAd: Baidu Netdisk NAS membership can enjoy fast download, concurrent downloads of 3 files, etc
connect.tianYiVipAd: 189 Cloud membership to enjoy fast download and other benefits
connect.currentTaskPostponed: Single file upload/download task is currently in progress, this task will be postponed

createConnect.createConnectToUgreen: Create connection between Cloud Drive and UGREEN NAS
createConnect.connectTips: It allows to upload or download files on the Cloud Drive at one time, and create file sync tasks

createConnectModal.title: Create connection
createConnectModal.selectDisk: Please select the Cloud Drive that you want to connect to
createConnectModal.authFailedTips: Your Cloud Drive account verification has expired or been revoked, please re-verify
createConnectModal.NASNetError: Network error for NAS devices. Please check the network settings and reconnect again
createConnectModal.createFailedTips: Connection for this Cloud Drive account already exists
createConnectModal.scanAndAuth: Scan to log in and authorize

connectErrorMsg.10001: Failed to obtain user cache information
connectErrorMsg.10003: This cloud drive account has been connected by user "{0}"
connectErrorMsg.10005: Connection for this Cloud Drive account already exists
connectErrorMsg.10007: The local path has been used. Please select again
connectErrorMsg.10008: The remote path has been used. Please select again
connectErrorMsg.10034: Verification failed. Please use the same cloud drive account for verification
connectErrorMsg.10035: Connection failed as Cloud Drive connection limit has been reached
connectErrorMsg.10036: This type of cloud storage is currently unavailable.
connectErrorMsg.10038: Unable to get third-party cloud storage accessToken
connectErrorMsg.10039: Unable to get the file list
connectErrorMsg.12007: Failed to obtain Baidu Netdisk order information
connectErrorMsg.12009: Failed to obtain Baidu Netdisk authorization code
connectErrorMsg.12010: Failed to refresh Baidu Netdisk accessToken
connectErrorMsg.12011: Failed to obtain device file list
connectErrorMsg.14025: OneDrive account does not exist. Please reconnect

newUserBaiduVip.tipsContent: To claim membership benefits, your Baidu account information needs to be transmitted to Baidu Netdisk. By clicking "Claim", you agree to the above data usage method

amazonS3.bucketNamingRuleHintBefore: Not compliant with naming conventions. Please refer to

connPricingTips.title: Charge details for {serverTypeName}:
connPricingTips.content1: Once connected, all storage and file operation fees will be charged directly to your account by  the official provider of {serverTypeName}
connPricingTips.content2: Charges may vary by storage class and operation frequency
connPricingTips.content3: Before use, please make sure you understand the {pricingRule} for {serverTypeName}
connPricingTips.customContent1: Once connected, file operations may incur API call fees from this custom server. These fees will be charged directly to your account by the server's provider
connPricingTips.customContent2: Before use, please make sure you understand the billing rules for this custom server

syncPricingTips.title: According to the policy of  {serverTypeName}, the storage class will affect file operation costs
syncPricingTips.content1: The storage class may affect the billing method for file operations. Please choose wisely. Actual fees will be calculated according to the {pricingRule} of {serverTypeName} and will be charged directly to your account by  the official provider of {serverTypeName}

highFrequency.title: Frequent access / Default: For performance-sensitive use cases (millisecond access required) and frequently accessed data

lowFrequency.title: Infrequent access: For infrequently accessed data that requires long-term storage

archive.title: Archive: For long-term storage of data that is rarely accessed

setting.appDataBaseLocationTips: Location for storing data from the "Cloud Drives" app (e.g.: logs and metadata)
setting.adminModelTips: One enabled, the administrator can view and manage other users' Cloud Drive connections in the overview
setting.noUsedTips: The setting has changed. Do you want to apply it?
setting.insufficient: The available capacity is less than 1 M
setting.cantMove: Unable to migrate for task in progress, please try again later!
setting.fileExist: A folder with the same name exists
setting.fileNameErr: The file name cannot contain any of the following characters /:
setting.hideSpecifiedFileTip: File name cannot start with "._" or use system reserved characters (e.g. "." or "..")

createSynchronizationTask.title: Create sync task
createSynchronizationTask.syncTips: File changes (addition, modification, deletion, move, etc.) on either the cloud storage or NAS will be synced on the other.
createSynchronizationTask.onlyDownloadDiskChange: Sync only data changes from the cloud storage to the NAS
createSynchronizationTask.onlyUploadDataToNas: Sync only the data changes from the NAS to the cloud drive
createSynchronizationTask.errTips: The directory selection is currently enabled. Please disable it before performing operations
createSynchronizationTask.deleteFile: Deleting files on the cloud storage won't affect files on the NAS
createSynchronizationTask.deleteFile2: Deleting files on the NAS won't affect files on the cloud storage
createSynchronizationTask.manualSynchronizationTips: Sync only when manually clicking "Sync now"
createSynchronizationTask.synchronizeScheduledTips: Sync automatically on a regular basis only according to the established sync plan
createSynchronizationTask.step2Tips: Sync strategy execution depends on the client. If you exit the client, sync stops
createSynchronizationTask.diskPathUsed: Cloud Drive path has been used
createSynchronizationTask.diskPathUsedTips: This Cloud Drive path has been used as a sync folder for another task. Please select another folder
createSynchronizationTask.taskControlTips: Ignore the number of failed files. When there are failed files but within this number, the task status will be partially synchronized successfully; if the number is exceeded, the task will be automatically stopped and a warning notification will be issued. Please check failed files details in sync log details.
createSynchronizationTask.pendingStopTips: Scanning differential files cannot be interrupted.
createSynchronizationTask.editExecuteTipsContent: Do you want to sync now?

newPlan.title: New plan
newPlan.tips: Sync strategy execution depends on the client. If you exit the client, sync stops
newPlan.deleteContext: Do you want to delete this plan?
newPlan.syncOncePlanDate: Start time cannot be earlier than the current time

advancedSetting.title: Advanced
advancedSetting.synchronizeFoldersTips: Please select the remote folder you want to sync
advancedSetting.fileFilterTips: Sync files and folders prefixed with "."
advancedSetting.filterExtensionNames: Filter the following file name or extension name
advancedSetting.tips1: To filter specified file name, please enter file name, such as abc.doc, test*.doc and tmp.*.
advancedSetting.tips2: To filter specified file type, please enter extension name, such as *.jpg.
advancedSetting.filterRulesTitleErr3: Please enter again in the specified format
advancedSetting.filterRulesTitleErr4: At least one filter setting item is required.
